task.query: Print all unique file paths under "testbed/dir1" compared to "testbed/dir2"
task.gold: comm -23 <(find /testbed/dir1 | sed 's#/testbed/dir1/##' | sort) <(find /testbed/dir2 | sed 's#/testbed/dir2/##' | sort) | sed 's#^#/testbed/dir1/#'
